base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of digdogger_bounce_split — a character (boss) from 1986 legend of zelda. Digdogger — orange spike-ball. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Digdogger — orange spike-ball; boss of Level 5 (Lizard) + Level 7. 2-frame bounce + 1 split-into-smaller-digdoggers frame. Flute (Recorder) needed to shrink it
